creator: nico@lifeisabug.com
text:
htop 0.9 looks like this: http://i.imgur.com/XRk5O.png
Seems like only cpu and maybe swap graphs work fine, memory is wrong and processes are not displayed (though I can scroll through them).

All 0.9 versions do not work for me (regardless of lsof support).
0.8 and previous versions were fine.

mounted are:
devfs on /dev (devfs, local, multilabel)
procfs on /proc (procfs, local)
linprocfs on /compat/linux/proc (linprocfs, local)
